g.text: No proprietary code leaves the cluster perimeter
VS Code for the Web (che-code) — runs inside OpenShift pod
OpenAI-compatible HTTPS → llm-d Gateway (ClusterIP — stays cluster-internal)
Ephemeral SSH key per session · RBAC-gated tunnel
SSHD port 2022 — not exposed via Route/Ingress
Desktop IDEs: Cursor · VS Code · Kiro · GitHub Copilot CLI
Heavy lifting runs server-side inside OpenShift
AI PLATFORM LAYER (Red Hat OpenShift AI 3.3)
HTTPRoute → llm-d Gateway (Envoy ext_proc filter) · TLS termination · mTLS sidecar injection
Scoring: prefix_cache_affinity × 0.4 + kv_cache_headroom × 0.3 + queue_depth × 0.3 → selects optimal vLLM replica
